action.title: Action
action.description: Select the type of operation to perform. Search and Hashtag currently work without login in our latest smoke tests, but cookies can still help when Threads shows login walls.

keyword.title: Search Keyword
keyword.description: ⚠️ Required for 'Search Posts' action. Enter keyword to search for posts.
keyword.sectionDescription: Fill this section when Action = Search Posts

username.title: Username
username.description: ⚠️ Required for 'User Profile' action. Enter username without @ (e.g., 'zuck')
username.sectionDescription: Fill this section when Action = User Profile

includePosts.title: Include Posts
includePosts.description: Also scrape recent posts from the profile page

tag.title: Hashtag
tag.description: ⚠️ Required for 'Hashtag Search' action. Enter hashtag without # (e.g., 'AI')
tag.sectionDescription: Fill this section when Action = Hashtag Search

postUrl.title: Post URL
postUrl.description: ⚠️ Required for 'Single Post' action. Full URL (e.g., https://www.threads.com/@user/post/ABC123)
postUrl.sectionDescription: Fill this section when Action = Single Post

filter.title: Sort By
filter.description: Sort results (applies to Search and Hashtag actions)

maxItems.title: Max Items
maxItems.description: Maximum number of posts to scrape

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Recommended: Enable Apify Proxy for better reliability

useCookies.title: Use Login Cookies
useCookies.description: Enable saved login state for auth-only fields and as a fallback when Threads shows login walls. Requires storageState below.
useCookies.sectionDescription: Use saved login cookies for more data access

storageState.title: Storage State (JSON)
storageState.description: Playwright storageState.json content exported after logging into Threads. If useCookies is true but this is empty, falls back to no-cookie mode.
